---
title: "Exploratory Data Visualization"
author: "Nathalie Bonnet"
date: 2026-02-04
format: html
warning: FALSE
---

```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
```

```{r}
# Load in data
zoopl <- read_csv(here("data", "EDI_data_zooplankton.csv")) %>% 
  clean_names()
```
